---
name: Security report
about: Report a security vulnerability. Read SECURITY.md first.
title: "[security] "
labels: security
assignees: ''
---

Do not put vulnerability details in this issue. Read [SECURITY.md](../blob/main/SECURITY.md) and email security@deathlegion.team instead.

Use this issue only to track that a report was sent, after you have emailed the security address. Leave the body of the issue empty or write "report sent on YYYY-MM-DD".
